decisions.decision: Treat this execution leaf as build-then-validate on the current branch: because `/v1/accounts/{id}/positions` still emits the legacy four-field row and lacks replay-backed `unrealizedPnl`, land or rebase the missing production seam before making the new `BayesMarketExposureProjectionTests` assertions authoritative.
alternatives_rejected: Write the new tests against the current four-field serializer and leave them red until some later branch lands the replay/P&L seam.
Treat this leaf as validation-only and avoid touching the backend prerequisite at all.

decisions.decision: Keep the new coverage in `BayesMarketExposureProjectionTests`, asserting representative replay/P&L behavior primarily through `get_account_positions(account_id)` while preserving the existing getter-versus-route parity baseline as the only required route-level smoke.
alternatives_rejected: Drive every weighted-average, partial-close, and sign-flip scenario through `route_request("GET", "/v1/accounts/{id}/positions")`.
Move the new cases into a separate helper-only cluster and stop checking route delegation near the public contract.

decisions.decision: Update the existing `/positions` baseline to freeze the additive five-field row `{marketId, outcomeId, netSize, lastTradePrice, unrealizedPnl}` together with lexical `(marketId, outcomeId)` ordering, instead of widening the payload with `/exposure` fields or leaving `unrealizedPnl` optional.
alternatives_rejected: Reuse the richer `/exposure` row contract in the `/positions` assertions.
Only add new replay cases and leave the baseline parity test on the legacy four-field shape.

decisions.decision: Build the weighted-average-add, partial-close, and sign-flip regressions mostly from accepted `EventTrade` writes and patch `query_market_atomic_probability_for_inference(...)` to fixed marks so the tests assert exact surviving signed `netSize` and `unrealizedPnl` against canonical fill pricing and exposure syncing.
alternatives_rejected: Seed all representative replay cases directly in storage and give up the accepted EventTrade flow.
Assert only relative P&L behavior without fixing the mark or checking survivor size.

decisions.decision: Cover the missing-history contract with a directly seeded live exposure row that has no usable replay history, asserting the row survives with `unrealizedPnl: 0.0`; validate the leaf with the focused service-index-plus-exposure pytest gate and keep the final audit diff scoped to `backend/server.py`, `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py`, and this task artifact.
alternatives_rejected: Drop live rows that have no replayable history.
Broaden the verification gate to an unrelated backend sweep or skip the parent-branch diff audit.

steps.task: Confirm the current branch has the replay-backed `/positions` production seam needed by this test leaf; if not, land or rebase the missing `backend/server.py` work so `BayesMarketExposureProjectionTests` can target the agreed five-field `{marketId, outcomeId, netSize, lastTradePrice, unrealizedPnl}` contract instead of the legacy four-field serializer.

Update the existing `BayesMarketExposureProjectionTests` `/positions` baseline in `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` so the getter-versus-route parity assertion now freezes lexical wire ordering and the full five-field row shape, including exact `unrealizedPnl` values for the seeded canonical rows.

Add representative replay/P&L regressions in `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` for same-side weighted-average adds, partial closes, and sign flips, building the fixtures mostly from accepted `POST /v1/markets/{id}/orders/event-trade` writes, patching the mark-query seam to fixed values, and asserting both the surviving signed `netSize` and exact `unrealizedPnl`.

Add a missing-history fallback regression in `BayesMarketExposureProjectionTests` that directly seeds a live `ACCOUNT_EXPOSURE` row without usable replayable order history and asserts `get_account_positions(account_id)` preserves the row with `unrealizedPnl: 0.0` instead of pruning it, dropping it, or failing the account read.

Run `python3 -m pytest -v --tb=short tests/test_bayes_market_api.py::BayesMarketApiUnitTests::test_root_route_returns_service_index tests/test_bayes_market_api.py::BayesMarketExposureProjectionTests`, review `git diff ff/Tbayes-market-i6y-execute-step-4..HEAD` for scope control, then stage the validated changes and create the execution commit.
